§6Desh Anvil§f is a high-tier crafting station for working with tough materials.

§eAnvil Tiers:§f
Iron → Steel → §bFerrouranium§f → §bDesh§f (this) → Higher tiers...

§eCapabilities:§f
• Work with harder materials
• Craft higher-tier components
• Essential for progression

§aTip:§f Each anvil tier unlocks new recipes - upgrade as soon as possible.
